summary: Free subscriber out of market - Game Tile
description:
GIVEN a user is a free subscriber
AND the game level blackedOutVideo equals false in MAST EPGv3
AND the game level entitledVideo equals false in MAST EPGv3

steps.action:
WHEN a user views/focuses a scheduled/in-progress out-of-market game tile
OR a user views/focuses an archive game tile
steps.result:
THEN a lock icon displays in the upper right corner of the game tile
AND the game tile header has a dark overlay over the team colors
